definition: The feeling of relief after a long exhale. The breath you take when something heavy finally lifts.
usage: Nakapalupad na siya. Giginhawa ang akong dughan.
usage_translation: He has already left. My chest finally breathed.
etymology: From ginhawa — breath, relief, comfort. The gi- prefix marks it as felt, experienced, lived.
note: There is no single English word for this. That is the point.
